$comment: Amazon product type definition for RING product type

parentage_level.title: Parentage Level
parentage_level.description: Specify whether a SKU is a parent or child

value.title: Parentage Level
value.description: Specify whether a SKU is a parent or child

child_parent_sku_relationship.title: Child Parent Sku Relationship
child_parent_sku_relationship.description: The attribute indicates the Child Parent Sku Relationship of the product

child_relationship_type.title: Child Relationship Type
child_relationship_type.description: The relationship that the child has to the parent

parent_sku.title: Parent SKU
parent_sku.description: The SKU of the parent item

variation_theme.title: Variation Theme
variation_theme.description: Specify the variation theme that the product will use. The theme's attributes must be populated for all items in the grouping.

name.title: Variation Theme Name
name.description: Specify the variation theme that the product will use. The theme's attributes must be populated for all items in the grouping.

item_name.title: Title
item_name.description: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

value.title: Item Name
value.description: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing

brand.title: Brand Name
brand.description: Provide the brand name of the product

value.title: Brand Name
value.description: Provide the brand name of the product

supplier_declared_has_product_identifier.title: Has GTIN exemption?
supplier_declared_has_product_identifier.description: Specify if the product is exempt from having a GTIN/UPC/EAN.

value.title: Has GTIN exemption?
value.description: Specify if the product is exempt from having a GTIN/UPC/EAN.

externally_assigned_product_identifier.title: External Product ID
externally_assigned_product_identifier.description: Provide the external ID (barcode) type and corresponding value that is being used to identify the product

type.title: External Product ID Type
type.description: Select the type of external ID (barcode) that is being used to identify this product

value.title: External Product ID
value.description: Provide the corresponding external product id value based on the type that was selected

merchant_suggested_asin.title: Merchant Suggested ASIN
merchant_suggested_asin.description: Provide an ASIN for your product if one exists. If a value is not provided, the system will attempt a match based on the External Product ID.

value.title: Merchant Suggested ASIN
value.description: Provide an ASIN for your product if one exists. If a value is not provided, the system will attempt a match based on the External Product ID.

recommended_browse_nodes.title: Recommended Browse Nodes
recommended_browse_nodes.description: Indicate the browse node or section of the Amazon website where the product will be assigned. This allows customers to find the product on the website easily. If you don't provide a node or if you provide an incorrect node, customers may not be able to find your product.

value.title: Recommended Browse Nodes
value.description: Indicate the browse node or section of the Amazon website where the product will be assigned. This allows customers to find the product on the website easily. If you don't provide a node or if you provide an incorrect node, customers may not be able to find your product.

enumNames: Küche, Haushalt & Wohnen > Basteln, Malen & Handarbeiten > Partyzubehör & Dekoration > Gastgeschenke > Schmuck-Packs > Ring-Packs

Sport & Freizeit > Sportfanshop > Schmuck & Uhren > Ringe

model_number.title: Style Number
model_number.description: An alphanumeric string up to a maximum of 40 characters in length.

value.title: Model Number

unspsc_code.description: The UN specified purchasing/taxonomy code corresponding to the item.

value.title: National Stock Number
value.description: Provide the product's NSN identifier

product_description.title: Product Description
product_description.description: Provide a text description of the product. This information will appear in paragraph form on the detail page of your product. Include unique product features, product line details, and product specifications. Do not use all caps.
examples: This summer, boots by Jette made from high quality suede leather are real gems. They visually highlight the craftsmanship and fine leather braid positioned at the top of the shaft

value.title: Product Description
value.description: Provide a text description of the product. This information will appear in paragraph form on the detail page of your product. Include unique product features, product line details, and product specifications. Do not use all caps.
examples: This summer, boots by Jette made from high quality suede leather are real gems. They visually highlight the craftsmanship and fine leather braid positioned at the top of the shaft

bullet_point.title: Bullet Point
bullet_point.description: Brief descriptive text, called out via a bullet point, regarding a specific aspect of the product. These display directly under or next to your product photo, it is useful to put interesting information in these fields. Do NOT use all caps or abbreviations. Please do NOT use for fabric content, care instructions or country as these are populated in different fields.

value.title: Bullet Point
value.description: Brief descriptive text, called out via a bullet point, regarding a specific aspect of the product. These display directly under or next to your product photo, it is useful to put interesting information in these fields. Do NOT use all caps or abbreviations. Please do NOT use for fabric content, care instructions or country as these are populated in different fields.

generic_keyword.title: Generic Keyword
generic_keyword.description: Provide any terms that may be relevant to customer searches. No repetition, no competitor brand names or ASINs.
examples: Water sport shoes; Derek Rose; Electric; Wi-Fi; Banana

value.title: Generic Keyword
value.description: Provide any terms that may be relevant to customer searches. No repetition, no competitor brand names or ASINs.
examples: Water sport shoes; Derek Rose; Electric; Wi-Fi; Banana

style.title: Style
style.description: Provide the design aesthetic or artistic movement that characterizes the appearance and craftsmanship of this jewelry item.

value.title: Style
value.description: Provide the design aesthetic or artistic movement that characterizes the appearance and craftsmanship of the item.

department.title: Department Name
department.description: Provide the section of the store where the jewelry item is typically sold, indicating the intended customer group.

value.title: Department Name
value.description: Provide the section of the store where the jewelry item is typically sold, such as women's, men's, or children's.

target_gender.title: Target Gender
target_gender.description: Provide the target gender for the product

value.title: Target Gender
value.description: Provide the target gender for the product

jewelry_material_categorization.title: Jewelry Material Categorization
jewelry_material_categorization.description: Provide whether the jewelry item is fine, made of at least one precious metal or gemstone, or fashion, made of non-precious materials.

value.title: Jewelry Material Categorization
value.description: Provide whether the jewelry item is fine, made of at least one precious metal or gemstone, or fashion, made of non-precious materials.

material.title: Material
material.description: Provide the material significantly contributing to the look or construction of the item, using "Metal" for all types of metals.

value.title: Material
value.description: Provide the material significantly contributing to the look or construction of the item, using "Metal" for all types of metals.

number_of_items.title: Number of Items
number_of_items.description: Provide the total number of identical items in the selling unit to the customer

value.title: Number of Items
value.description: Provide the total number of identical items in the selling unit to the customer

item_package_quantity.title: Item Package Quantity
item_package_quantity.description: Provide the number of packages sold as part of a single item. An ASIN selling 5 boxes of paperclips with 100 paperclips per box would have item package quantity = '5'

value.title: Item Package Quantity
value.description: Provide the number of packages sold as part of a single item. An ASIN selling 5 boxes of paperclips with 100 paperclips per box would have item package quantity = '5'

color.title: Color
color.description: Provide the color of the product

standardized_values.title: Color Map
standardized_values.description: Provide the most dominant color of the ring. Select the color that appears most prominently on the jewelry piece.

value.title: Color
value.description: Provide the color of the product

is_resizable.title: Is the item resizable?
is_resizable.description: If the item is resizable select yes, if it is not select no

value.title: Is the item resizable?
value.description: If the item is resizable select yes, if it is not select no

ring.title: Ring
ring.description: The attribute indicates Ring of the product

size.title: Ring Size
size.description: Provide the size of the ring

value.title: Ring Size
value.description: Provide the size of the ring

sizing_lower_range.title: Ring Size Lower Range
sizing_lower_range.description: Provide the lower limit of the ring size range

value.title: Ring Size Lower Range
value.description: Provide the lower limit of the ring size range

sizing_upper_range.title: Ring Size Upper Range
sizing_upper_range.description: Provide the upper limit of the ring size range

value.title: Ring Size Upper Range
value.description: Provide the upper limit of the ring size range

size.title: Size
size.description: Provide the size of the item

value.title: Size
value.description: Provide the size of the item

item_diameter.title: Item Diameter
item_diameter.description: Provide the diameter of the item

decimal_value.title: Item Diameter Decimal Value
decimal_value.description: Provide the diameter of the item as a decimal

unit.title: Item Diameter Unit
unit.description: Select the unit of measure for Item Diameter. If a value is provided for Item Diameter, you must also enter the corresponding unit.

pendant_description.title: Pendant Description
pendant_description.description: Provide a description of the pendant

value.title: Pendant Description
value.description: Provide a description of the pendant

metal_type.title: Metal Type
metal_type.description: Provide the entire metal composition of the item, including multiple metals if present and base metals for filled or plated items.

value.title: Metal Type
value.description: Provide the entire metal composition of the item, including multiple metals if present and base metals for filled or plated items.

metal_stamp.title: Metal Stamp
metal_stamp.description: Provide the official mark stamped into the surface of the jewelry item indicating the purity or fineness of the metal.

value.title: Metal Stamp
value.description: Provide the official mark stamped into the surface of the jewelry item indicating the purity or fineness of the metal.

metals.title: Metals
metals.description: Provide each unique metal present in the item, including an identification number, the metal type, metal stamp, and weight of each.
examples: id:1, metal_type:White Gold, metal_stamp:14K, metal_weight.value: 5, metal_weight.unit: Grams

id.title: Metal ID
id.description: Provide a unique ID number to identify each unique type of metal present in the item.

metal_type.title: Metal type
metal_type.description: Provide the metal type that is in the item

value.title: Metal Type
value.description: Provide one of the unique metals in the item.

metal_stamp.title: Metal stamp
metal_stamp.description: Provide the appropriate metal stamp representing the metal's fineness

value.title: Metal Stamp
value.description: Provide the official mark stamped into the surface of the item indicating the purity or fineness of the unique type of metal.

metal_weight.title: Metal Weight
metal_weight.description: Provide the weight of the unique type of metal present in the item.

value.title: Metal Weight
value.description: Provide the weight of the unique type of metal present in the item.

unit.title: Metal Weight Unit
unit.description: Provide the corresponding unit used to designate the weight of the unique type of metal present in the item.

gem_type.title: Gem Type
gem_type.description: Provide the type of stone incorporated into the item's design, indicating the specific mineral, stone, or crystalline material.

value.title: Gem Type
value.description: Provide the type of stone incorporated into the item's design, indicating the specific mineral, stone, or crystalline material.

setting_type.title: Setting Type
setting_type.description: Provide the setting design and associated method used to secure stones, gems, pearls, or other decorative items to the jewelry piece.

value.title: Setting Type
value.description: Provide the setting design and associated method used to secure stones, gems, pearls, or other decorative items to the jewelry piece.

stones.title: Stones
stones.description: Provide each unique stone in the item, including an id number, stone type, cut, creation method, treatment, and other relevant information.
examples: Id: 1, type: Ruby, number_of_stones: 3, creation_method: Lab-Created, treatment_method: Bleached, cut: Excellent

id.title: Stone ID
id.description: Provide a unique id to number/identify each unique stone type

type.title: Stones Type
type.description: The attribute indicates the Stones Type of the product

value.title: Stone Type
value.description: Provide the type of stone incorporated into the item's design, indicating the specific mineral, stone, or crystalline material.

number_of_stones.title: Number of Stones per Type
number_of_stones.description: Provide the number of stones of the selected type in the jewelry item.

creation_method.title: Stones Creation Method
creation_method.description: The attribute indicates the Stones Creation Method of the product

value.title: Stone Creation Method
value.description: Provide the type of process by which the stones in the jewelry item were created, indicating how they were made.

treatment_method.title: Stones Treatment Method
treatment_method.description: The attribute indicates the Stones Treatment Method of the product

value.title: Stone Treatment Method
value.description: Provide the treatment process applied to the stones in the jewelry item used to improve appearance or durability.

clarity.title: Stones Clarity
clarity.description: The attribute indicates the Stones Clarity of the product

value.description: Describe the clarity of the stone

value.description: Provide the color of the Stone

cut.title: Stones Cut
cut.description: The attribute indicates the Stones Cut of the product

value.title: Stone Cut
value.description: Provide the cut grade of the stones in the jewelry item, considering proportion, symmetry, and polish.

shape.title: Stones Shape
shape.description: The attribute indicates the Stones Shape of the product

value.title: Stone Shape
value.description: Describe the shape of the stone

stone.title: Stone
stone.description: The attribute indicates Stone of the product

clarity.title: Stone Clarity
clarity.description: Provide the clarity grade of the stone used in the item, indicating the degree to which inclusions or blemishes are present.

value.title: Stone Clarity
value.description: Provide the clarity grade of the stone used in the item, indicating the degree to which inclusions or blemishes are present.

color.title: Stone Color
color.description: Provide the color of the stone used in the jewelry item.

value.title: Stone Color
value.description: Provide the color of the stone used in the jewelry item.

creation_method.title: Stone Creation Method
creation_method.description: Select the value(s) that best describe(s) how the product's stone(s) were created. This information will surface in the Product Specifications widget on the detail page.

value.title: Stone Creation Method
value.description: Select the value(s) that best describe(s) how the product's stone(s) were created. This information will surface in the Product Specifications widget on the detail page.

value.title: Stone Cut
value.description: Select the appropriate stone cut

shape.title: Stone Shape
shape.description: Provide the shape of the jewelry item's stone encompassing all surfaces, including shape as seen from above and the pattern of the cut.

value.title: Stone Shape
value.description: Provide the shape of the jewelry item's stone encompassing all surfaces, including shape as seen from above and the pattern of the cut.

weight.title: Stone Weight
weight.description: Provide the weight of the stone used in the jewelry item.

value.title: Stone Weight
value.description: Provide the weight of the stone used in the jewelry item.

unit.title: Stone Weight Unit
unit.description: Provide the corresponding unit used to designate the weight of the stone in the jewelry item.

width.title: Stone Width
width.description: Specify the stone width of the product

value.description: Specify the stone width of the product

unit.description: Provide the corresponding unit used to designate the width measurement of the stone in the ring.

value.title: Total Diamond Weight
value.description: Provide the total diamond weight

pearl.title: Pearl
pearl.description: The attribute indicates Pearl of the product

lustre.title: Pearl Lustre
lustre.description: Provide the shine or iridescence of the pearls included in the item, which is the quality of light reflecting off their surface.

value.title: Pearl Lustre
value.description: Provide the shine or iridescence of the pearls included in the item, which is the quality of light reflecting off their surface.

minimum_color.title: Pearl Color
minimum_color.description: Provide the color best describing the pearls included in the item.

value.title: Pearl Color
value.description: Provide the color best describing the pearls included in the item.

shape.title: Pearl Shape
shape.description: Provide the overall form or shape of the pearls included in the item.

value.title: Pearl Shape
value.description: Provide the overall form or shape of the pearls included in the item.

stringing_method.title: Pearl Stringing Method
stringing_method.description: Provide the technique used to string the pearls onto the thread-like medium holding them.

value.title: Pearl Stringing Method
value.description: Provide the technique used to string the pearls onto the thread-like medium holding them.

surface_blemishes.title: Pearl Surface Blemishes
surface_blemishes.description: Provide the degree of surface imperfections, if any, present on the pearls included in the item.

value.title: Pearl Surface Blemishes
value.description: Provide the degree of surface imperfections, if any, present on the pearls included in the item.

type.title: Pearl Type
type.description: Provide the most prominent type of pearl included in the item by quantity when multiple of the same type are used or size when type varies.

value.title: Pearl Type
value.description: Provide the most prominent type of pearl included in the item by quantity when multiple of the same type are used or size when type varies.

uniformity.title: Pearl Uniformity
uniformity.description: Provide how well the individual pearls included in the item have been matched to each other.

value.title: Pearl Uniformity
value.description: Provide how well the individual pearls included in the item have been matched to each other.

number_of_pearls.title: Number of Pearls
number_of_pearls.description: Provide the count of individual pearls included in the item.

value.title: Number of Pearls
value.description: Provide the count of individual pearls included in the item.

size_per_pearl.title: Pearl Size
size_per_pearl.description: Provide the diameter of an item’s pearls as an average when they are matched in size or as a range when they vary in size.

value.title: Pearl Size
value.description: Provide the diameter of an item’s pearls as an average when they are matched in size or as a range when they vary in size.

occasion_type.title: Occasion
occasion_type.description: Provide the special event or celebration for which this item is designed or commonly given as a gift.

value.title: Occasion
value.description: Provide the special event or celebration for which this item is designed or traditionally given.

part_number.title: Part Number
part_number.description: Provide the part number. For many products, this will be identical to the model number however some manufacturers distinguish part number from model number

value.title: Part Number
value.description: Provide the part number. For many products, this will be identical to the model number however some manufacturers distinguish part number from model number

collection.title: Collection Name
collection.description: Enter the name of collection that an item belongs to.

value.description: Specify the shape of the item

value.description: Provide the primary high-level subject, concept, topic, motif, or idea of an item.

initial_character.title: Initial Character
initial_character.description: Provide the letter or character that represents a personal monogram or decorative element on jewelry pieces.

examples: Mom, Sister, God Bless, Love Always

examples: Mom, Sister, God Bless, Love Always

value.description: Provide the version or edition of the item

item_display_dimensions.title: Item Display Dimensions
item_display_dimensions.description: Provide the dimensions of the product, without packaging and fully assembled

flavor.title: Flavor
flavor.description: Provide the branded name of the item's flavor(s). If no branded flavor name is available, provide the generic term for the item's flavor(s).
examples: Tutti Frutti, Double Rich Chocolate, Beef

value.title: Flavor
value.description: Provide the branded name of the item's flavor(s). If no branded flavor name is available, provide the generic term for the item's flavor(s).
examples: Tutti Frutti, Double Rich Chocolate, Beef

grade_rating.title: Grade Rating
grade_rating.description: Provide the quality or classification rating assigned to the item, indicating its overall assessment or ranking.

value.title: Grade Rating
value.description: Provide the quality classification or rating assigned to the item, indicating its level of craftsmanship or material quality.

pattern.title: Pattern
pattern.description: Provide the most prominent repeated decorative design of the item

value.title: Pattern
value.description: Provide the most prominent repeated decorative design of the item

item_form.title: Item Form
item_form.description: Provide a value that represents the form of the item

value.title: Item Form
value.description: Provide a value that represents the form of the item

unit_count.title: Unit Count
unit_count.description: Provide the total number of units that make up the item, indicating the quantity and measurement type.

value.title: Unit Count
value.description: For products that are consumed by volume, weight, linear dimension, etc., provide the net quantity that would be shipped to a customer who orders one ASIN (e.g. 12 pack of 6 floz. bottles of water = 72, vs. a single 2 liter bottle = 2). For products consumed as individual units, provide the total number of units (pack of 12 pens = 12). For packed assortments of non-identical items, enter 1

type.title: Unit Count Type
type.description: For items consumed by volume, weight, linear dimension etc., provide the unit of measure listed on the products. For products consumed as individual units, enter: count

value.title: Unit Count Type
value.description: For items consumed by volume, weight, linear dimension etc., provide the unit of measure listed on the products. For products consumed as individual units, enter: count

product_site_launch_date.title: Product Site Launch Date
product_site_launch_date.description: Provide the date the product launches and should first be shown on the Amazon website (YYYY-MM-DD format). PSLD does not impact buyability or pre-order logic, it is used to indicate when a product will be visible and searchable on the Amazon website

value.title: Product Site Launch Date
value.description: Provide the date the product launches and should first be shown on the Amazon website (YYYY-MM-DD format). PSLD does not impact buyability or pre-order logic, it is used to indicate when a product will be visible and searchable on the Amazon website

scent.title: Scent

item_thickness.title: Item Thickness
item_thickness.description: Total thickness of the usable product. Do not include modifier. If the item is newsprint wrap, enter the paper thickness; or if the product is a pair of loading dock plates, enter the plate's thickness.

decimal_value.title: Item Thickness Decimal Value
decimal_value.description: Provide the thickness of the item as a decimal

string_value.title: Item Thickness
string_value.description: Provide the thickness of the item as a string

unit.title: Item Thickness Unit
unit.description: Select the unit of measure for Item Thickness. If a value is provided for Item Thickness, you must also enter the corresponding unit.

number_of_stones.description: Provide the total number of stones used in the jewelry item.

ring_form_type.description: Provide the form of the ring. The ring form represents the overall shape of the ring, including the types of embellishments that a specific form allows.

set_name.title: Set Name
set_name.description: Provide the manufacturer's official name for the product set. If no official name exists, summarize the type and number of its components.
examples: Strata Ultimate Golf Club Set (16 Piece)

value.description: Provide the manufacturer's official name for the product set. If no official name exists, summarize the type and number of its components.
examples: Strata Ultimate Golf Club Set (16 Piece)

letter_character.title: Letter Character
letter_character.description: Provide the single alphabetic letter or character represented on or by the item. It excludes characters used to personalize the item.

collection_item.title: Collection Item
collection_item.description: Provide the name of the individual item within the collection.

value.description: Provide the name of the individual item within the collection.

skip_offer.title: Skip Offer
skip_offer.description: Please indicate whether the offer should be skipped and a buyable offer should not be created. A value of "Yes", means no offer will be created.

value.title: Skip Offer
value.description: Please indicate whether the offer should be skipped and a buyable offer should not be created. A value of "Yes", means no offer will be created.

fulfillment_availability.title: Fulfillment Availability
fulfillment_availability.description: For those merchants using Amazon fulfillment services, please provide associated logistical information.

fulfillment_channel_code.title: Fulfillment Channel Code
fulfillment_channel_code.description: For those merchants using Amazon fulfillment services, this designates which fulfillment network will be used. Specifying a value other than DEFAULT will cancel the Merchant-fulfilled offering.

quantity.title: Quantity
quantity.description: Enter the quantity of the item you are making available for sale. This is your current inventory commitment (as a whole number)

lead_time_to_ship_max_days.title: Handling Time
lead_time_to_ship_max_days.description: Provide the time, in days, between when you receive an order for an item and when you can ship the item

restock_date.title: Restock Date
restock_date.description: Date that product will be restocked

is_inventory_available.title: Inventory Always Available
is_inventory_available.description: Always available inventory is an alternative to quantity that allows inventory to never deplete. Enabling or disabling will toggle this feature on or off. Note that a quantity cannot be specified when provided.

purchasable_offer.title: Purchasable Offer
purchasable_offer.description: The attribute indicates the Purchasable Offer of the product

our_price.title: Purchasable Offer Our Price

schedule.title: Purchasable Offer Our Price Schedule
schedule.description: The attribute indicates the Purchasable Offer Our Price Schedule of the product

value_with_tax.title: Your Price

schedule.description: The attribute indicates the Purchasable Offer Maximum Seller Allowed Price Schedule of the product

value_with_tax.title: Sale Price
value_with_tax.description: The price at which you offer the product for sale.

start_at.title: Sale Start Date
start_at.description: The date that the sale price will begin to override the product's standard price; the sale price will be displayed after 0:00AM of Sale From Date.

end_at.title: Sale End Date
end_at.description: The last date that the sale price will override the item's standard price; the product's standard price will be displayed after 0:00AM of Sale End Date.

start_at.title: Purchasable Offer Start At
start_at.description: The attribute indicates the Purchasable Offer Start At of the product

end_at.title: Purchasable Offer End At
end_at.description: The attribute indicates the Purchasable Offer End At of the product

value.title: Stop Selling Date

quantity_discount_plan.title: Purchasable Business Offer Quantity Discount Plan
quantity_discount_plan.description: Provide and define the quantity discount plan for your business price.
examples: Schedule Quantity Price Type: Fixed; Schedule Levels Quantity Lower Bound: 5; Schedule Levels Quantity Price: 10

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.description: Provide the details, such as dates, pricing type that define your scheduled quantity discount plan.
examples: Quantity price start date: 06/30/2024; Quantity price end date: 07/01/2024

discount_type.title: Quantity Price Type
discount_type.description: Provide whether the quantity price type is fixed, a price set in local currency for each quantity threshold, or a percentage of business price

lower_bound.title: Quantity Threshold (Lower Bound)
lower_bound.description: Provide the minimum purchase quantity necessary to receive the discount. It will apply to all units if the quantity threshold is met.

value.title: Quantity Price (Fixed Price/Percentage Discount)
value.description: Provide the quantity price for each quantity threshold or the discount percentage offered on the business price for each quantity threshold.

condition_type.description: Provide the actual condition type of the product

value.title: Item Condition
value.description: Provide the actual condition type of the product

examples: Small dent in left side panel.

value.title: Offer Condition Note
value.description: Provide descriptive text explaining the actual condition of the item
examples: Small dent in left side panel.

list_price.title: List Price
list_price.description: Provide the list price for the product. List Price is the suggested retail price of a product as provided by a manufacturer, supplier, or seller. This is not the offering or cost price.

value_with_tax.title: List Price with Tax
value_with_tax.description: Provide the list price for the product including the tax. List price is often referred to as the manufacturer's suggested retail price (MSRP) or the recommended retail price (RRP) set by the manufacturer and provided by the manufacturer, supplier, or seller. This is not the offering or cost price. If you are unable to provide a value, enter 0.

value.title: Product Tax Code

List price is often referred to as the manufacturer's suggested retail price (MSRP) or the recommended retail price (RRP) set by the manufacturer and provided by a manufacturer, supplier, or seller. This is not the offering or cost price.

Saint Helena, Ascension and Tristan da Cunha

The Democratic Republic of the Congo

batteries_required.title: Are batteries required?
batteries_required.description: Select "yes" if batteries are required to power the item (or if the item is a battery) or no if they are not. Please note that an internal rechargeable battery is also considered a battery

value.title: Are batteries required?
value.description: Select "yes" if batteries are required to power the item (or if the item is a battery) or "no" if they are not. Please note that an internal rechargeable battery is also considered a battery

batteries_included.title: Are batteries included?
batteries_included.description: Select "yes" if batteries are contained in the product (e.g. batteries inside a pair of Bluetooth headphones) and/or included with the product (e.g. batteries packed separately with a camera), otherwise select "no"

value.title: Are batteries included?
value.description: Select "yes" if batteries are contained in the product (e.g. batteries inside a pair of Bluetooth headphones) and/or included with the product (e.g. batteries packed separately with a camera), otherwise select "no"

cell_composition.title: Battery Cell Composition
cell_composition.description: Select the chemical composition of the battery cell

value.title: Battery Cell Composition
value.description: Select the chemical composition of the battery cell

cell_composition_other_than_listed.title: Battery Cell Composition Other Than Listed
cell_composition_other_than_listed.description: Provide the components of the item's battery cell that are not already listed under battery cell composition.

value.title: Battery Cell Composition Other Than Listed
value.description: Provide the components of the item's battery cell that are not already listed under battery cell composition.

iec_code.title: Battery IEC Code
iec_code.description: Provide the item’s battery IEC code. IEC is standardized alphanumeric nomenclature based on battery size & type available on battery itself.

value.title: Battery IEC Code
value.description: Provide the item’s battery IEC code. IEC is standardized alphanumeric nomenclature based on battery size & type available on battery itself.

weight.title: Battery Weight
weight.description: Provide the total net weight of the batteries included. This is the weight of the standalone batteries not including packaging or the device it may be used in

value.title: Battery Weight
value.description: Provide the total net weight (numeric value) of the batteries included. This is the weight of the standalone batteries not including packaging or the device it may be used in.

unit.title: Battery Weight Unit
unit.description: Provide unit for battery weight

num_batteries.title: Number of Batteries
num_batteries.description: Provide the quantity and type of batteries needed to power the item.  If batteries are included with the item be sure to account for spare batteries provided

quantity.title: Number of Batteries
quantity.description: Specify the number of batteries needed to power the item.  If batteries are included with the item be sure to account for spare batteries provided

type.title: Battery Type
type.description: Provide battery type needed to power the item, including spares if included. Some options may be moved under other attribute eg. IEC code

number_of_lithium_metal_cells.title: Number of Lithium Metal Cells
number_of_lithium_metal_cells.description: Specify the total number of Lithium Metal cells in the product where the cell isn't contained in an encased battery (e.g. coin cells)

value.title: Number of Lithium Metal Cells
value.description: Specify the total number of Lithium Metal cells in the product where the cell isn't contained in an encased battery (e.g. coin cells)

number_of_lithium_ion_cells.title: Number of Lithium-ion Cells
number_of_lithium_ion_cells.description: Specify the total number of Lithium-ion cells in the product where the cell isn't contained in an encased battery. For example, an AA battery is considered a cell

value.title: Number of Lithium-ion Cells
value.description: Specify the total number of Lithium-ion cells in the product where the cell isn't contained in an encased battery. For example, an AA battery is considered a cell

lithium_battery.title: Lithium Battery
lithium_battery.description: The attribute indicates the Lithium Battery of the product

energy_content.title: Lithium Battery Energy Content
energy_content.description: Provide the total energy stored in the lithium batteries used to power the item, measured in Watt Hours.

value.title: Lithium Battery Energy Content
value.description: Provide the total energy stored in the lithium batteries used to power the item, measured in Watt Hours.

unit.title: Lithium Battery Energy Content Unit

packaging.title: Lithium Battery Packaging

examples: Batteries Contained in Equipment, Batteries Only, Batteries Packed with Equipment

value.title: Lithium Battery Packaging
value.description: Select “in equipment” if the battery is contained in the item . Select “with equipment” if the battery is packed separately with the device it is meant to power. Select “only” if the product is a battery sold alone or with items it is not meant to power.
examples: Batteries contained in equipment, Batteries packed with equipment, Batteries only

value.description: Provide the regulatory identification associated with the regulation type.

dsa_responsible_party_address.title: Responsible Person's Email or Electronic Address
dsa_responsible_party_address.description: Provide the email address or URL for the EU Responsible Person, representing the product in compliance with EU regulations.

value.title: Responsible Person's Email or Electronic Address
value.description: Provide the email address or URL for the EU Responsible Person, representing the product in compliance with EU regulations.

compliance_media.title: Compliance Media
compliance_media.description: Provide information on the product documents you want to display on the product detail page to comply with the General Product Safety Regulation (GPSR). Alternatively, you can upload images under the PS01-PS06 variants in the Image Manager.

content_type.title: Compliance Media Content Type
content_type.description: Please enter the content type of the compliance document.

content_language.title: Compliance Media Language
content_language.description: Provide the language used for the content of the compliance media.

source_location.title: Compliance Media Source Location
source_location.description: Provide the source location of the compliance media.

gpsr_safety_attestation.title: GPSR Safety Attestation
gpsr_safety_attestation.description: Check “yes” if your product doesn’t have any warning and safety information, as it can be used safely and as intended without it.

value.title: GPSR Safety Attestation
value.description: Check “yes” if your product doesn’t have any warning and safety information, as it can be used safely and as intended without it.

gpsr_manufacturer_reference.title: GPSR Manufacturer Reference
gpsr_manufacturer_reference.description: Provide the email address or URL of the manufacturer to comply with the EU General Product Safety Regulation (GPSR). If you’ve already submitted this manufacturer’s information in the past, make sure you use the same email or URL.

gpsr_manufacturer_email_address.title: Manufacturer’s Email or Electronic Address
gpsr_manufacturer_email_address.description: Provide the email address or URL of the manufacturer to comply with the EU General Product Safety Regulation (GPSR). If you’ve already submitted this manufacturer’s information in the past, make sure you use the same email or URL.

has_multiple_battery_powered_components.title: Has Multiple Battery Powered Components
has_multiple_battery_powered_components.description: Provide whether the item consits of more than one battery powered components.

value.title: Has Multiple Battery Powered Components
value.description: Provide whether the item consits of more than one battery powered components.

ships_globally.title: Ships Globally
ships_globally.description: Provide whether the item can be shipped globally by Amazon

value.title: Ships Globally
value.description: Provide whether the item can be shipped globally by Amazon

contains_battery_or_cell.title: Contains Battery or Cell
contains_battery_or_cell.description: Provide whether the item uses cells with a single electrochemical unit or batteries with multiple connected cells within a casing.

value.title: Contains Battery or Cell
value.description: Provide whether the item uses cells with a single electrochemical unit or batteries with multiple connected cells within a casing.

battery_contains_free_unabsorbed_liquid.title: Battery Contains free Unabsorbed Liquid
battery_contains_free_unabsorbed_liquid.description: Provides certification that your battery meets transport regulations for free-flowing liquid: no unabsorbed liquid at 55°C & no leakage.

value.title: Battery Contains free Unabsorbed Liquid
value.description: Provides certification that your battery meets transport regulations for free-flowing liquid: no unabsorbed liquid at 55°C & no leakage.

is_battery_non_spillable.title: Is Battery Non Spillable
is_battery_non_spillable.description: Provides certification confirming your battery meets transport regulations for non-spillable status, including vibration and pressure tests

value.title: Is Battery Non Spillable
value.description: Provides certification confirming your battery meets transport regulations for non-spillable status, including vibration and pressure tests

non_lithium_battery_packaging.title: Non-Lithium Battery Packaging
non_lithium_battery_packaging.description: Provide "in equipment" for batteries installed in devices, "with equipment" for those packed separately with the device, and "only" for standalone batteries.

value.title: Non-Lithium Battery Packaging
value.description: Provide "in equipment" for batteries installed in devices, "with equipment" for those packed separately with the device, and "only" for standalone batteries.

has_replaceable_battery.title: Has Replaceable Battery
has_replaceable_battery.description: Provide whether the item's battery is replaceable.

value.title: Has Replaceable Battery
value.description: Provide whether the item's battery is replaceable.

non_lithium_battery_energy_content.title: Non-Lithium Battery Energy Content
non_lithium_battery_energy_content.description: Provide the item's energy content for non-lithium batteries. The attribute refers to the total amount of energy that a battery can store.

value.title: Non-Lithium Battery Energy Content
value.description: Provide the item's energy content for non-lithium batteries. The attribute refers to the total amount of energy that a battery can store.

unit.title: Non-Lithium Battery Energy Content Unit
unit.description: Provide unit of measure used to determine the total amount of energy that a battery can store.

has_less_than_30_percent_state_of_charge.title: Has Less than 30 Percent State of Charge
has_less_than_30_percent_state_of_charge.description: Provide whether the item's battery contains less than 30 percent charge during shipping.

value.title: Has Less than 30 Percent State of Charge
value.description: Provide whether the item's battery contains less than 30 percent charge during shipping.

battery_installation_device_type.title: Battery Installation Device Type
battery_installation_device_type.description: Provide the item's battery installation type. Specifying whether a battery is installed in a vehicle, vessel, or not installed in any device.

value.title: Battery Installation Device Type
value.description: Provide the item's battery installation type. Specifying whether a battery is installed in a vehicle, vessel, or not installed in any device.

is_oem_sourced_product.title: Is OEM Sourced Product
is_oem_sourced_product.description: Provide whether the item is directly sourced from the original equipment manufacturer (OEM).

value.title: Is OEM Sourced Product
value.description: Provide whether the item is directly sourced from the original equipment manufacturer (OEM).

ghs_chemical_h_code.title: GHS Chemical H Code
ghs_chemical_h_code.description: Provide the GHS chemical hazard codes for the chemical substance/mixture in order to display warnings to customers.

value.title: GHS Chemical H Code
value.description: Provide the GHS chemical hazard codes for the chemical substance/mixture in order to display warnings to customers.

epr_eco_fee_eubr.title: EPR Eco-fee EUBR
epr_eco_fee_eubr.description: Provide the EPR battery fee for the item. EPR fees are payments made to support the end-of-life management of products and packaging.

value.title: EPR Eco-fee EUBR
value.description: Provide the EPR battery fee for the item. EPR fees are payments made to support the end-of-life management of products and packaging.

currency.title: Provide the currency associated with the EPR Eco-fee EUBR.
